name: Naji Kanounji
title: Software Engineer
summary: Software engineer with experience in backend development, API integrations, and automation tools. Obsessed with finding better ways to automate workflows and improve efficiency. Skilled in building scalable, user-focused solutions through hands-on development in Python and Kotlin and RESTful APIs, while collaborating closely with product and engineering teams. Passionate about using technology to simplify complex processes and drive product excellence.
